query: SELECT 'PLACES' as source, p.name FROM places p WHERE p.atollId = 3 AND p.type = 'island' UNION ALL SELECT 'ISLAND_GUIDES' as source, ig.name FROM island_guides ig WHERE ig.atoll LIKE '%Baa%' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 'PLACES' as source, p.name FROM places p WHERE p.atollId = 3 AND p.type = 'island' UNION ALL SELECT 'ISLAND_GUIDES' as source, ig.name FROM island_guides ig WHERE ig.atoll LIKE '%Baa%' ORDER BY name;
